scenes.description: 一位身穿深色衣物的人物在浅色调的室内走廊中从左向右行走，最终走进右侧的门内。环境安静温馨，光线柔和自然。
scenes.video_prompt: A person in dark clothing walks steadily through a warm-toned indoor hallway, moving from left to right and disappearing through a door. The walls are light beige, with wooden flooring and simple decor like framed pictures. Soft natural light filters through a nearby window, creating a calm and inviting atmosphere. A slow tracking side-shot follows the figure smoothly. Shot on 4K digital cinema camera, 24fps, shallow depth of field, realistic lighting and textures.

style_elements.characters: Person in dark casual clothing, walking calmly
style_elements.environment: Indoor home or office corridor with wooden floor and soft-lit walls
style_elements.visual_style: Warm tones, natural lighting, realistic texture, peaceful mood
style_elements.camera_movement: Smooth lateral tracking shot following the character

scenes.description: 动画风格场景：小熊驾驶拖拉机陷入泥潭，车轮打滑无法前进。小兔子和小绵羊在车上，大家显得焦急。背景为乡村田野，泥坑湿滑，气氛紧张但带有童趣。
scenes.video_prompt: Animated countryside scene: a cartoon bear struggles to drive a tractor stuck in thick mud, wheels spinning uselessly. A rabbit and sheep sit inside, looking worried. The environment features lush green fields, muddy terrain, and overcast sky adding drama. Expressive character animations with exaggerated emotions. Camera starts with a low front angle showing sinking wheels, then cuts to close-ups of faces. Rendered in vibrant 3D animation style, soft shading, 30fps, playful yet tense tone.

style_elements.characters: Cartoon bear, rabbit, and sheep with expressive features
style_elements.environment: Rural field with deep mud pit and overcast sky
style_elements.visual_style: Colorful 3D cartoon style, soft textures, expressive lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Low-angle shots of wheels, close-ups of characters, dynamic cuts

scenes.description: 小兔子下车尝试推车未果，三人被困。小熊提出清理泥浆的想法，但感到疲惫。角色互动展现团队合作与挫败感，背景泥地细节丰富。
scenes.video_prompt: The rabbit hops out to push the tractor but slips in the mud, emphasizing slipperiness. All three animals express frustration — hair covered in muck, clothes dirty. They huddle together discussing solutions. Warm emotional expressions show camaraderie despite failure. Detailed mud textures glisten under diffused daylight. Medium group shots alternate with individual reaction close-ups. Stylized 3D animation with high-detail surfaces, 25fps, focus on physical comedy and emotional nuance.

style_elements.characters: Muddy, disheveled animal characters showing emotion and teamwork
style_elements.environment: Wet, deep mud terrain in open grassland
style_elements.visual_style: Expressive cartoon rendering with realistic mud physics
style_elements.camera_movement: Medium group shots, close-ups on facial reactions, slight handheld effect for realism

scenes.description: 小胡（狐狸）出现，展示自制真空吸尘器。他兴奋地解释其功能，并请求帮助搬运。科技元素融入童话世界，带来幽默与希望。
scenes.video_prompt: A clever fox (Hu) arrives triumphantly holding a makeshift vacuum cleaner cobbled from pipes and motors. He explains enthusiastically while gesturing. The device looks comically oversized yet functional. Other animals watch in surprise and curiosity. Scene shifts to lighter tone with hopeful music cues. Wide reveal shot shows the invention, followed by cooperative movement as bear helps carry it. Brightened color palette, whimsical tech design. 3D animation with cartoon exaggeration, smooth motion, 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Inventive fox presenting a quirky machine; others reacting with wonder
style_elements.environment: Same muddy field, now with focus on improvised tool
style_elements.visual_style: Whimsical fusion of rural setting and DIY tech, bright colors
style_elements.camera_movement: Wide reveal, over-the-shoulder angles during explanation, dolly-in on device

scenes.description: 吸尘器连接拖拉机电池并启动，开始吸取泥浆。镜头聚焦机器运作过程，泥浆被逐渐清除，气氛转为兴奋与期待。
scenes.video_prompt: The vacuum is connected to the tractor’s battery. With a switch flip, it roars to life, sucking up thick mud with powerful suction effects. Splashes and debris fly realistically. Close-up shots show mud being pulled away from tires. Animals cheer as progress becomes visible. Lighting brightens symbolically. Dynamic camera movements include circling around the machine and low-angle shots emphasizing power. High-frame-rate simulation of fluid dynamics. Vibrant 3D animation, energetic pacing, 30fps.

style_elements.characters: Animals cheering and reacting to machine success
style_elements.environment: Mud-covered ground gradually clearing around tractor
style_elements.visual_style: Dynamic particle effects, realistic fluid animation, energetic visuals
style_elements.camera_movement: Circular tracking, close-ups on suction action, low-angle power shots

scenes.description: 小熊推动拖拉机成功脱困，车辆缓缓驶出泥坑。动物们欢呼庆祝，拥抱表达喜悦。画面充满成就感与友情温暖。
scenes.video_prompt: With the mud cleared, the bear pushes the tractor forward — it slowly lurches free! The vehicle rolls onto solid ground. Cheers erupt from the rabbit and sheep. They jump and hug in relief and joy. Slow-motion moment captures the triumph. Golden-hour lighting enhances emotional warmth. Wide celebratory shot includes all characters dancing slightly. Soft focus transitions, warm color grading. 3D animated style with emotional depth, 24fps, cinematic finish.

style_elements.characters: Joyful animal friends celebrating rescue and teamwork
style_elements.environment: Edge of mud pit, transitioning to dry grassy land
style_elements.visual_style: Golden-hour glow, soft focus, emotionally rich coloring
style_elements.camera_movement: Slow-motion push-out shot, wide celebration frame, gentle zoom-in on hugs

scenes.description: 拖拉机送达甘草，小羊们开心进食。最后众人跳舞庆祝，传递互助与快乐的主题。结尾字幕显示日语问候，增添国际氛围。
scenes.video_prompt: The tractor arrives at a meadow where baby lambs eagerly await. Bales of hay are unloaded — the hungry lambs rush to eat. The team dances together in celebration: bear, rabbit, fox, sheep forming a joyful circle. Playful choreography and smiling faces radiate friendship. Final text overlay reads '皆さんなかな' in cheerful font. Sunset backdrop bathes scene in orange-pink hues. Smooth wide shot rotates around dancers. 3D cartoon style, family-friendly tone, 24fps, heartwarming closure.

style_elements.characters: Animal crew dancing happily with fed lambs nearby
style_elements.environment: Sunny meadow at sunset, pastoral and peaceful
style_elements.visual_style: Sunset lighting, joyful animation, clean UI text overlay
style_elements.camera_movement: Rotating wide shot around dancing group, final static title card
